scripts.build:site: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run index:search
scripts.serve: npm run build:site && npm run preview
scripts.check:links: python3 scripts/check_links.py && python3 scripts/check_markdown_link_spacing.py && python3 scripts/check_source_link_texts.py && python3 scripts/check_link_texts.py && python3 scripts/check_summary_icons.py
scripts.manual:uk:check: npm run check:english-style && npm run check:links && npm run build:site
scripts.check:spelling: PATH="$HOME/Library/Python/3.13/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" codespell -q 3 en-GB en-US README.md STYLE_GUIDE.md LANGS.md TRANSLATIONS.md scripts .github book.json package.json plugins/liberation/index.js plugins/liberation/package.json plugins/liberation/assets/liberation.css -L Sie,te,co-ordinate,co-ordinates || python3 -m codespell -q 3 en-GB en-US README.md STYLE_GUIDE.md LANGS.md TRANSLATIONS.md scripts .github book.json package.json plugins/liberation/index.js plugins/liberation/package.json plugins/liberation/assets/liberation.css -L Sie,te,co-ordinate,co-ordinates
